title: NEO-LEDGER
description: A decentralized financial dashboard reimagined for the brutalist web. Neo-Ledger tackles the complexity of multi-chain asset management with high-performance tracking.
problem: Traditional crypto-wallets and dashboards were cluttered with unnecessarily complex navigation patterns and heavy visual overhead.

problems.detail: Legacy interfaces relied on deprecated frameworks, causing massive bundle sizes and sluggish rendering on low-end hardware.
Inefficient state management led to frequent race conditions during high-volume financial transactions.
Monitoring systems used periodic 5-second polling, resulting in unacceptable lag during volatile market shifts.

solution: We implemented a strict Neobrutalist system that prioritizes data hierarchy and performance over decorative fluff.

solutions.detail: Rebuilt the entire system using Next.js Server Components to minimize client-side load and maximize execution speed.
Implemented robust state machines for transaction management, ensuring predictable outcomes and data integrity.
Migrated to WebSocket-based subscriptions for instant (<100ms) data updates without taxing the user's browser.

blocks.heading: The Core Philosophy
blocks.body: For NEO-LEDGER, we stripped away every non-essential visual element. Every component had to pass the 'Raw Logic' test: if a border didn't define structure, it was removed.

technical.frontend: Built on Next.js for high-performance server-side rendering.
technical.realtime: Leveraging WebSockets and reactive state management.
technical.security: End-to-end encrypted session and transaction protocols.

title: BRUTALIST UI KIT
description: A collection of 50+ neobrutalist components for Figma and the Web, designed for high-impact engineering interfaces.
problem: Modern UI kits often prioritize 'safe' and bland aesthetics that fail to capture the raw energy of engineering.

problems.detail: Most UI kits look identical, lacking the strong visual distinction needed for bold tech products.

solution: We broke the conventions by introducing heavy borders and high-contrast layouts.

solutions.detail: Provided an incredibly strong visual structure that ensures hierarchy is immediately apparent.

blocks.heading: Visual Identity
blocks.body: We believe design should have an opinion. The Brutalist UI Kit isn't for everyone—it's for those who dare to build different.

technical.frontend: Pure CSS components with zero external abstraction layers.
technical.security: Clean, maintainable, and lightweight code architecture.
